evaluator_results.note: aside z-[60] > header z-50. Desktop toggle button z-[65]. Backdrop z-[55]. No z-index conflict between sidebar and header.
No process.env or NEXT_PUBLIC_ENABLE_COMMENTS reference in PostCard.tsx. Comment button onClick is unconditional; comment section renders purely on showComments state.
MobileNav is in layout.tsx. CSS .mobile-nav: position:fixed; bottom:0; left:0; right:0; height:64px; z-index:50. Hidden at >=768px via media query.
PostCard uses animationDelay: `${index * 60}ms` inline style. Feed passes index={startIdx + idx}. .post-card has animation: fall-in 480ms var(--ease-expo) both.
.post-card:hover { transform: translateY(-5px); box-shadow: 0 28px 56px -18px ... } with spring easing transition on transform and box-shadow.
